name: Jean-Pierre Leroy
bio: 35 years of experience in the 7th and 8th arrondissements. Expert in 'Mouton et Gueule de Loup' joints and slim-glazing bed optimization.

name: Christophe Bénard
bio: Former director of an EPV-labeled firm. Specialized in the preservation of rare glass and historical hardware.

name: Pascal Turpin
bio: Expert in mechanical restoration of large-format casements. Owns a library of 14 proprietary Haussmannian molding planes.

name: Gilles Dupuis
bio: UNESCO zone specialist. Master of the 'Grand Cadre' profile and historical timber consolidation using heritage resins.

name: Hans Müller
bio: Expert in high-performance thermal gaskets for heritage frames. Specialist in the heavy oak joinery of the Neustadt district.

name: Yves Duchamp
bio: Specialist in the heavy timber frames of Vieux Lyon. Expert in structural reinforcement without visible modification.

name: Jean-François Merceron
bio: Focus on the Graslin and Centre-Ville districts. Expert in moisture-resistant oak restoration for the Loire climate.

name: Luc Clavey
bio: Early adopter of vacuum-insulated glass in heritage frames. Proprietary routing jig for 6mm glass beds.

name: Marc Lefebvre
bio: Restores original Crémone bolts and espagnolettes. Owns the largest private collection of 18th-century window hardware in SW France.

name: Bernard Frizza
bio: Expert in reproducing rare molding profiles using traditional hand-planes. Consultant for ABF compliance dossiers.

name: Philippe Gosselin
bio: Expert in non-structural wood rot repair. Uses heritage resins to preserve 80% of original frame material.

name: Robert Schilt
bio: Specialist in the historic joinery of the Petite France and Neustadt zones. Expert in traditional weatherstripping.

name: Alain Petit
bio: Focused on the maintenance of neoclassical maritime properties. Expert in salt-resistant timber treatments.

name: Thierry Giraud
bio: Master of the complex 'Doucine' and 'Talon' profiles. Owns rare 18th-century molding planes passed down for 3 generations.

name: Pierre-Yves Angelini
bio: Advises on project classification as 'Entretien'. Specializes in the technical dossiers required for the 1st-6th Arrondissements.

name: Jacques Goujat
bio: Expert in the mechanical calibration of guillotine and counterweight windows. Master of fluid sash movement.

name: Michel Viguier
bio: Specialist in the integration of Fineo glass into 14mm rebates. Developed a 'no-vibration' routing technique for old oak.

name: Stéphane Brossard
bio: Performs technical triage for the Lignum pilot program. Expert in identifying rot-free 'dormants' for restoration eligibility.

name: Dominique Perrault
bio: Developed 'invisible' silicone seals for heritage casements. Bypasses DPE drafts without altering the facade profile.

name: Hubert Valeri
bio: Consultant on aesthetic purity for high-net-worth clients. Owns a proprietary collection of Haussmannian 'Doucine' planes.
